name: Auxo Cenote
summary: A portable electronic dab rig for concentrates with app control and replaceable ceramic nails, for patients who medicate with extracts.
description: The Auxo Cenote is a battery-powered dab rig built for concentrates on the go. Disposable ceramic nails make loading and cleaning simple, and temperature runs across three presets plus a Pro Mode in the AUXO app for finer control over a 200-340C range. A glass recycler mouthpiece cools the vapour, and you get around 12 sessions per charge with both wireless and USB-C charging. At 320g with a travel case included, it's portable rather than pocketable. Suits patients who prefer concentrates and want a self-contained rig without a torch, backed by a 10-year warranty.
